description:
An Environmental Engineer at GNU Solidario Hospital has certified the HVAC systems for a newly constructed negative-pressure isolation wing. Configure this new infrastructure in GNU Health so Infection Control can begin admitting patients with highly contagious airborne diseases. Create a new ward named 'Airborne Infection Isolation Ward' for the 'GNU Solidario' institution. Within this ward, configure two new beds named 'AIIR-01' and 'AIIR-02'.

Login credentials:
- URL: http://localhost:8000/
- Username: admin
- Password: gnusolidario
